# Agent-Friendly Documentation Spec

> A specification defining 22 checks across 7 categories for evaluating how well documentation sites serve coding agents.

## Docs

- [Full Spec](https://agentdocsspec.com/spec/index.md): The complete specification with all checks, thresholds, and implementation guidance.
- [Home](https://agentdocsspec.com/index.md): Overview, quick start guide, and background links.

## Tools

- [afdocs](https://github.com/agent-ecosystem/afdocs): CLI tool and Node.js library that implements this spec. Run `npx afdocs check <url>` to test a documentation site.
